name: nextcloud/dpatracker
description:
<![CDATA[DPA Tracker helps organizations document and manage their data processing agreements (DPAs) and subprocessors directly within Nextcloud, in line with GDPR Article 30.

For each subprocessor you record the purpose of processing, the categories of personal data involved, the provider's location, and a CLOUD Act risk indicator showing whether the provider has a US parent company. DPA documents can be attached, review dates tracked, and an audit-ready record of processing activities exported.

Because everything runs inside your own Nextcloud instance, your compliance data never leaves your infrastructure — no third-party SaaS, no external cloud. Designed for SMEs and public-sector organizations that need GDPR and NIS-2 documentation on sovereign infrastructure.]]>
